transit.header: Morris and Essex and North Jersey Coast Line remains suspended through Saturday morning due to ongoing repairs to infrastructure damage following last night’s severe storms. Possible residual impacts
transit.description: Morris and Essex and North Jersey Coast Line remains suspended through Saturday morning due to ongoing repairs to infrastructure damage following last night’s severe storms. Possible residual impacts on other rail lines. NJ TRANSIT rail tickets and passes are being cross honored on NJ TRANSIT and private carrier buses and PATH at Newark Penn Station, Hoboken Terminal, and 33rd Street, New York.
